name: You've Got Mail - Stealth Office Simulator

reviews.review_description:
This game is fun it's also a good idea

 by the way developer if you're seeing this please don't give up on game development you have such good potential

developer_response.body: Thank you so much.  That was very nice.

reviews.review_title: this is a fun little game
reviews.review_description:
if you get caught i cant seem to get another parcel back in the stock room.
i have to quit and start again.
but I'm not very techy and i'm sure there's probably a way of getting a new package with out restarting.
let me know if you find out how to do it lol .

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for playing!  When you are caught, the parcel is left on the ground where you were caught.  You must deliver the dropped parcel before the machine will give you another one. Hope that helps.  Have a great day and thank you for the review.
